title: Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Junior
text: Home * People * Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Júnior Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Junior [1] Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Júnior , a Brazilian computer scientist and software engineer holding a Bachelor's degree in computer science from Universidade Salgado de Oliveira , São Gonçalo, Rio de Janeiro [2] . As computer chess programmer, Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Júnio is author of the UCI compliant open source chess engine RedQueen [3] . Forum Posts [ edit ] Problem using XBoard + Polyglot + Zippy on FICS by Ben-Hur Carlos Langoni , CCC , November 15, 2010 » XBoard , PolyGlot , Free Internet Chess Server Improving evaluation of passed pawns by Ben-Hur Carlos Langoni , CCC , January 22, 2011 » Passed Pawn , Candidate Passed Pawn , Unstoppable Passer Questions on SMP search by Ben-Hur Carlos Langoni , CCC , April 21, 2011 » Parallel Search Most wanted missing features for a chess GUI by Ben-Hur Carlos Langoni , CCC , December 14, 2013 » GUI External Links [ edit ] Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Junior | LinkedIn bhlangonijr (Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Junior) · GitHub RedQueen Chess Engine website RedQueen | Chess Engine References [ edit ] ↑ Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Junior @ ICT 2010 , Image by Eric van Reem , Rybka wins 10th ICT in Leiden by Eric van Reem , ChessVibes , May 31, 2010 ↑ Ben-Hur Carlos Vieira Langoni Junior | Software Engineer @ Radiant IQ ↑ RedQueen | Chess Engine Up one level ]
